creator: gerard.amailland@jouy.inra.fr
text:
Hello,

I can not change language for thunderbird 12.0
I have an error in compiling thunderbird-i18n.
cd / usr/ports/mail/thunderbird-i18n
make install clean

"/usr/ports/Mk/bsd.gecko.mk", line 402: warning: String comparison operator should be either == or !=                                                   
"/usr/ports/Mk/bsd.gecko.mk", line 402: Malformed conditional (${_TMP_VER} >= 100)                                                                      
"/usr/ports/Mk/bsd.gecko.mk", line 432: warning: String comparison operator should be either == or !=                                                   
"/usr/ports/Mk/bsd.gecko.mk", line 432: Malformed conditional (${_THUNDERBIRD_VER} < 31)                                                                
"/usr/ports/Mk/bsd.port.mk", line 1534: if-less endif                                                                                                   
"/usr/ports/Mk/bsd.port.mk", line 6342: if-less endif                                                                                                   
make: fatal errors encountered -- cannot continue

Fix: 

My solution

I have a freebsd 8.2
I retrieve /usr/local/lib/xpi 
and I replace in freebsd 9.0
